title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen from Settings for both updates
scenario: New DFU screen design in Settings shows available updates for earbuds and charging case on Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Legend 50
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Home screen.
Tap the Update button on the Home screen.
Observe the Settings screen opens with the SW update tab displayed.
Verify the new DFU screen design is shown, listing all available firmware updates for both the earbuds (EB) and charging case (CC).
Select an available update (e.g., for Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Legend 50).
Tap the update/install button to proceed.
expected: The Settings screen opens with the SW update tab showing a new DFU design. All available firmware updates for both earbuds and charging case are presented clearly for the user to choose from.
